title: Person
description: A subscriber (person) in the Vibes Platform mobile contact book.

person_key.description: Internal Vibes Platform unique identifier for the person.

external_person_id.description: External identifier assigned by the customer's system.

mobile_phone.description: Person's mobile phone number. Recommended format: E.164 (e.g. +15551234567).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the person was added to the contact book.
